summary.one_line: Cut stage and infrastructure were strong, but polish added almost no value without a thesis and zoom density/scale lagged behind the intended style.

followed: measured cut, polish, and zoom metrics
captured bugs fixed during the run

issues.title: Polish was near-worthless without a thesis
issues.description: The full render → transcribe → evaluate loop removed only 5.4 seconds because the highest-value pacing category was disabled.
issues.operator_takeaway: Run expensive evaluation loops only when the stage has enough editorial context to act meaningfully.

issues.title: Zoom scales were too conservative
issues.description: The run used old 1.10–1.30 defaults and under-delivered on emphasis.
issues.operator_takeaway: If defaults change, regenerate downstream artifacts or make the dependency explicit.

issues.title: Zoom density was sparse
issues.description: 18 zooms over ~20 minutes left a 229-second dead zone and undershot the emerging editorial taste.
issues.operator_takeaway: More frequent, gentler zooms can add production value without feeling gimmicky.

issues.title: The extension had never been smoke tested
issues.description: Broken handler registration and message sending existed from the first commit and only surfaced during this run.
issues.operator_takeaway: Thin smoke tests catch embarrassing integration bugs before a real run does.

recommendations.action: Make the full polish loop conditional on having a meaningful thesis, or degrade to a lighter stumble-only pass.
Add stage skip flags such as --skip-polish and --skip-zoom.
Regenerate zooms when calibration defaults change or avoid baking those defaults too early.
Add a smoke test that verifies handler registration and message sending.

feedback_hooks.question: Does a real thesis materially improve polish-stage pacing decisions on fresh videos?
feedback_hooks.how_to_compare: Compare future rough-cut-only runs against thesis-informed polish runs.

feedback_hooks.question: What zoom density and scale ranges survive operator review across multiple videos?
feedback_hooks.how_to_compare: Track future operator edits and compare against zoom sidecars.
